name: agentguard
description: Universal shell wrapper that intercepts dangerous commands from AI coding agents

scripts.test: node test/classifier.test.js && node test/notifier.test.js && node test/config.test.js && node test/event-bus.test.js && node --test test/decoder.test.js && node --test test/suppression.test.js && node --test test/correlator.test.js && node --test test/enforcement.test.js && node --test test/snapshot-restore.test.js && node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/.bin/jest test/approval-diff.test.js
